categories.name: Field Type Translation
categories.description: Salesforce field types vs Mailchimp merge tag types

categories.name: Identity & Email Changes
categories.description: Email change handling and subscriber identity

categories.name: Subscriber Status Sync
categories.description: Status transitions between Salesforce and Mailchimp

categories.name: Campaign & Segment Mapping
categories.description: Campaign membership to Mailchimp segment/tag mapping

mappings.toolBValue: Mailchimp requires DELETE old + POST new
mappings.notes: PATCH does not support email changes. Old subscriber remains, new email is rejected as duplicate.
mappings.fixStrategy: On email change: GET subscriber by old email, DELETE, POST with new email, re-apply merge tags.

mappings.notes: Salesforce sends full datetime. Mailchimp date merge tag expects date-only. Datetime sent to date field stores incorrectly.
mappings.fixStrategy: Cast Salesforce datetime to DATE before sending. Use Mailchimp BIRTHDAY merge type for birth dates.

mappings.notes: Syncing status='subscribed' to a Mailchimp unsubscribed member re-subscribes them. GDPR violation in EU.
mappings.fixStrategy: Before PATCH: GET member status from Mailchimp. If status is 'unsubscribed' or 'cleaned', skip sync or require explicit opt-in.

mappings.toolBValue: Mailchimp tag (string, multiple tags per member)
mappings.notes: Campaign status ('Sent', 'Responded', 'Bounced') can map to Mailchimp tags. 'Bounced' should map to status change, not tag.
mappings.fixStrategy: Map Salesforce campaign member status to Mailchimp tag add/remove. 'Bounced' → skip tag, update member status to 'cleaned'.

errors.description: PATCH doesn't allow email changes. Old subscriber persists with old email.
errors.fixSummary: DELETE old subscriber, POST new subscriber with preserved data.

errors.description: Syncing status=subscribed re-subscribes Mailchimp unsubscribes. GDPR risk.
errors.fixSummary: Check Mailchimp member status before syncing. Skip unsubscribed/cleaned.

errors.description: Salesforce datetime sent to Mailchimp date merge tag stores incorrectly.
errors.fixSummary: Cast datetime to DATE before sending.
